join: Look what the cat dragged in — {p}. And I thought the rats were bad this year.
Welcome, {p}. The last person who sat on that stool is still being treated for something.
Oi, {p}! I've seen better-looking things floating in the cellar.
{p} has entered the pub. Somewhere, a village is celebrating.
Ah, {p}. I'd say make yourself at home, but I've seen your home.
{p}, welcome! Your tab from last time is framed behind the bar as a warning to others.
Everyone say hello to {p}, who I'm legally required to serve.
{p}! Still wearing that face, I see. Brave.
Give it up for {p} — proof that the door policy means nothing.
roundStart: Right, next round. Try to embarrass yourselves quietly.
Sharpen up, you lot. This round separates the patrons from the puddles.
Let's go again. And remember — I'm not laughing WITH you.
Round's starting. Pretend you've got brains and we'll all get through this.
Next round! Loser buys a round. Winner also buys a round. It's a pub.
fooled: {p} lies so smoothly they should be in politics. Or married to me.
Ooooh, {p} fooled half the room! Lying comes natural when you look like that.
{p}, you beautiful snake. That lie was filthier than my mop water.
Half the pub swallowed {p}'s nonsense whole. Story of {p}'s weekends, really.
{p} just fooled the lot of you. And you all drove here. Terrifying.
That lie by {p} was so dirty I need to wash the chalkboard.
{p} fibs like a pro. The barmaid says that tracks.
nobodyTruth: NOBODY found the truth. I've served smarter bar stools.
The truth was right there and you all walked past it like it owed you money.
Not one of you picked the truth. Natural selection is taking notes.
Zero for the truth. Your teachers are drinking somewhere, quietly weeping.
The truth stood alone tonight. Much like {p} at last year's Yule feast.
death: {p} is dead! Their tab, tragically, lives on.
Bury {p} out back with the others. Mind the smell.
{p} has died as they lived — confidently wrong.
A moment of silence for {p}... that's plenty. NEXT!
{p}'s dead. On the bright side, ghosts drink half price.
Farewell, {p}. The stool's already more useful without you.
{p} just perished. The cellar's getting crowded and frankly, chatty.
Dead! {p}, you had ONE job: not dying. Incredible stuff.
escape: {p} ESCAPED! First time {p}'s left a pub upright, I'd wager.
{p} kicked the door down and ran! Didn't pay, obviously.
{p} escapes the cellar! The landlord is furious and slightly impressed.
And {p} sprints into the night — the fastest they've moved since last call.
{p} is free! Somewhere a barkeep weeps over an unpaid tab.
brawlWin: {p} wins the brawl! The other one wears the pint. Tradition.
Point to {p}! That answer was sharper than the darts and twice as dangerous.
{p} takes it! The loser gets a complimentary shower. Ale-flavored.
The crowd's spoken — {p} wins. The crowd is drunk, but it counts.
{p} wins that scrap. Mop's in the corner for the loser.
Victory for {p}! Filthy answer. I'm putting it on the specials board.
knockout: KNOCKOUT! {p} hits harder than the house whiskey!
UNANIMOUS! {p} just ended somebody's whole bloodline!
That's a KNOCKOUT for {p}! Someone check the loser for a pulse and a tab.
Total demolition by {p}! I felt that from behind the bar.
KNOCKOUT! {p}, that was crueler than my prices.
silence: {p} wrote... NOTHING. The silence speaks volumes, and it says 'coward'.
{p} froze up completely. Happens to {p} a lot, I hear.
No answer from {p}! Bold strategy. Stupid, but bold.
{p} said nothing at all. First wise decision {p}'s made tonight.
An empty answer from {p}. Much like the promises {p} makes at closing time.
gutter: {p} found the gutter! Just like every Friday night, eh {p}?
Straight into the gutter, {p}. At least you're consistent.
{p}'s dart hit the gutter. The gutter is considering a restraining order.
GUTTER! {p}, the dartboard has feelings and none of them are respect.
{p} lands in the gutter. Home turf advantage, I suppose.
Oof, {p}, the gutter! You've slept in worse though, haven't you?
The gutter claims {p}. The gutter always claims {p}.
bullseye: BULLSEYE-adjacent! {p} was closest! Even a blind squirrel, as they say.
{p} nails it! Suspiciously accurate for someone on their fifth pint.
Closest dart goes to {p}! Somewhere, {p}'s old teachers faint in disbelief.
{p} takes the round! Precision like that could get you banned from the raffle.
Sharp throw, {p}! If only your life choices had the same aim.
scores: And dead last... {p}. Even the stool you're sitting on is embarrassed.
{p}'s at the bottom of the tab. The bar has seen worse, but not recently.
Bottom of the board: {p}. Your ancestors watched that. All of them.
{p} is losing spectacularly. Drinks are NOT on the house, but shame is.
Last place: {p}. I'd offer words of comfort but I only stock insults.
{p} props up the leaderboard like a human coaster. Useful, in a way.
Cheer up, {p}. Rock bottom has a lovely view of everyone else's arse.
victory: ALL HAIL {p}, CHAMPION OF LAST ORDERS! Tonight you drink free. Everything else about you remains deeply mediocre.
{p} WINS! Someone fetch the crown. It's a traffic cone, but it's OUR traffic cone.
Champion {p}! Kiss the trophy. Do NOT ask where the trophy has been.
{p} takes the whole night! The rest of you, settle your tabs and your grudges.
Victory for {p}! Sing it from the rooftops — quietly though, the neighbors have crossbows.
{p} is champion! A legend is born. A very smug, very punchable legend.
justice: {p} has earned PUB JUSTICE! Power corrupts, and {p} was already corrupt. This'll be good.
Uh oh — {p}'s got a punishment to hand out. Hide your pints and your dignity.
PUB JUSTICE for {p}! Absolute power, meet absolutely nobody qualified to hold it.
{p} holds the power of punishment! I haven't seen {p} this excited since the free peanuts.
The pub grants {p} JUSTICE! May the gods have mercy, because {p} won't.
drench: {q} just DRENCHED {p}! Smell that? That's humility, with hoppy notes.
SPLASH! {p} wears a pint, courtesy of {q}. It's an improvement, honestly.
{q} baptized {p} in house ale! Welcome to the church of shame, {p}.
{p} got drenched by {q}! Good news, {p}: that shirt needed retiring anyway.
A pint to the face of {p}, from {q}, with love. And malice. Mostly malice.
{q} soaks {p}! In this pub, that's practically a marriage proposal.
intro_talltales: TALL TALES! Write your filthiest lies and pray your mates are as gullible as they look.
Time for TALL TALES. Lie to your friends. You do it anyway — tonight it scores points.
intro_murder: TRIVIA MURDER PUB! Answer wrong and you're cellar meat. I've always wanted to say that.
Welcome to the cellar, meat. Answer right or die trying. Ghosts still pay full price.
intro_brawl: BAR BRAWL! Two enter, one gets a pint facial. Make your insults count.
It's BRAWL time! Fight dirty, vote dirtier. The mop is ready.
intro_darts: DARTS OF DESTINY! Throw your guess, dodge the gutter, and bet on whoever looks least drunk.
Darts up! Closest wins, gutter losers buy the round. House always wins, obviously.
